foxablazeultimate.skill.raphael.descript: Listen to the principles of all things; in silence, deduce cause and effect; reduce the manifold powers into a single, true answer.
foxablazeultimate.skill.raphael.fusion_d: §b§o《Notice. Individual support authority has been elevated. Thought Acceleration, Analytical Appraisal, and Parallel Processing have been re-integrated.》
foxablazeultimate.skill.raphael.fusion_m: §r §cGreat Sage and Degenerate have fused into Wisdom King · Raphael!
gamerule.raphaelTrulyUnique.description: When enabled, only one player on the server may possess Raphael.
foxablazeultimate.skill.uriel.descriptio: Bind the faith of all into a silent, unbreakable order, woven from invisible vows.
foxablazeultimate.skill.uriel.skill_decl: §b§o《Notice. The intangible covenant has been acknowledged. Hearts converge, beliefs unify, and the principle of protection takes form. A new sovereignty has answered the call.》
foxablazeultimate.skill.beelzebub.descri: Devour the form of all things, sink the souls of all beings into the depths of imaginary space, and turn every existence into power of one’s own.
foxablazeultimate.skill.beelzebub.fusion: §b§o《Notice. Gluttony and Mercilessness have been recognised as a single greater hunger. Reintegrating into the higher-order "Gluttony King". Imaginary Space authority is now unlocked.》
§r §cGluttony and Merciless have fused into Gluttony King · Beelzebub!
gamerule.beelzebubTrulyUnique.descriptio: When enabled, only one player on the server may possess Beelzebub.
gamerule.beelzebubDisableCapture.descrip: When enabled, Imaginary Space will no longer devour living entities and acts as storage only.
gamerule.protectUltimateOnReset: Ultimate Skills Immune to Reset Scroll
gamerule.protectUltimateOnReset.descript: When enabled, reset scrolls will not remove Raphael, Beelzebub, or Uriel from the player.
item.foxablazeultimate.captured_entity.r: §oLeft-click in the Imaginary Space to summon it ahead
foxablazeultimate.beelzebub.fluid.extrac: §oRight-click with bucket / sponge / glass bottle to extract
foxablazeultimate.predation_filter.butto: Add blocks to the blacklist to prevent accidental devouring.
foxablazeultimate.predation_filter.comma: Added %s predation filter slots for %s. Current total: %s (admin bonus: %s)
%s does not have Raphael, so predation filter slots cannot be added.
